title: braya hirta
intro: Braya hirta, also known as the woolly bittercress or Arctic bittercress, is a perennial herb native to the Arctic tundra regions of North America and Greenland. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Braya hirta include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Braya hirta is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
